name: daily-digest
description: Auto-generates daily and weekly summaries of swarm activity — tasks completed, bugs fixed, plans advanced, agent utilization. Routes to operator inbox.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: Timezone
configSchema.description: IANA timezone for digest generation (e.g. America/Chicago)

configSchema.label: Digest Hour
configSchema.description: Hour of day (0-23) to generate digest
